title: CAVA: The Next Chipotle At An Unreasonably Low Price
text: CAVA, a Mediterranean restaurant, has seen a decline in its stock value since going public five months ago, now trading at a lower price-to-sales than Chipotle. The company operates in a similar business model to Chipotle and has the potential to capitalize on the growing "Mediterranean diet" health trend. CAVA's gross margins mirror that of Chipotle, giving it similar long-term profit potential if it can manage an efficient growth trajectory.
